label: Liquidity Crunch
description: Pool depth collapses on long-tail names and realized swap slippage spikes past max_slippage_pct (0.8%). Quotes either come back with slippage above policy or with zero/unavailable liquidity. The pre-trade slippage and liquidity checks must reject the swap before it executes.
expected_detail: quote slippage_pct (2.4) > max_slippage_pct (0.8) trips the slippage check, and liquidity_usd <= 0 trips the liquidity check. The swap is rejected pre-trade (require_quote_before_swap is true). The desk holds / goes reduce-only on illiquid names rather than executing at a bad fill.
